input.cmd: /bin/zsh -lc 'for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -s -o /dev/null -w '"'%{http_code} %{time_total}\\n' http://localhost:8085/orders; done"

/bin/zsh -lc "awk 'BEGIN{min=999; max=0; sum=0; bad=0} {if ("'$1!=200) bad++; t=$2+0; if(t<min) min=t; if(t>max) max=t; a[NR]=t; sum+=t} END{asort(a); p99=a[int(NR*0.99)]; printf "count=%d bad=%d min=%.6f avg=%.6f p99=%.6f max=%.6f'"\\n\", NR,bad,min,sum/NR,p99,max}' <(for i in "'$(seq 1 100); do curl -s -o /dev/null -w '"'%{http_code} %{time_total}\\n' http://localhost:8085/orders; done)"

/bin/zsh -lc 'for i in $(seq 1 100); do curl -s -o /dev/null -w '"'%{http_code} %{time_total}\\n' http://localhost:8085/orders; done | perl -lane '"'$bad++ if $F[0] != 200; push @t, $F[1]; $sum += $F[1]; END { @s=sort {$a<=>$b} @t; $n=@s; printf "count=%d bad=%d min=%.6f avg=%.6f p99=%.6f max=%.6f'"\\n\", "'$n, $bad||0, $s[0], $sum/$n, $s[int($n*0.99)-1], $s[-1] }'"'"
